mapper.select: SELECT menu_id, menu_name, parent_menu_id, sort_order, is_active FROM TBL_MENU WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MENU (menu_name, parent_menu_id, sort_order, is_active, creator_id, create_dttm) VALUES (#{menuName}, #{parentMenuId}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, #{creatorId}, #{createDttm})
